violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store boxes of canned food items off floor in back prep area.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of vacuum sealing raw meats and sous vide cooking.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers and freezers are in need of cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Storage shelving needs cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood system in need of cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean manner to protect from contamination. Shelving and utility cart that dishware is being stored on needs cleaning. Store excess equipment etc. off floors from under shelving.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Store boxes of food service items off floor in FOH area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning in kitchen and prep areas. Clean under shelving units, coolers, freezers, and line cooking equipment.
